SignInPage.title: Sign In
SignInPage.signInToAccount: Sign in to your account to continue.
SignInPage.usePretix: We use our ticket system, Pretix, to provide a single sign-on experience.
SignInPage.clickButtonToRedirect: Clicking the button below will redirect you to the Pretix login page.
SignInPage.afterLoggingIn: After logging in, you will be redirected back to this application.
SignInPage.forgotDescription: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
SignInPage.forgotSuccessMessage: If an account exists for that email, we've sent a reset link. Check your inbox.
SignInPage.invalidCredentials: Invalid email or password. Please try again.
SignInPage.tooManyAttempts: Too many failed sign-in attempts. Please try again in 15 minutes.
SignInPage.rateLimitError: Too many requests from your connection. Please try again later.

SignUpPage.title: Create account
SignUpPage.description: Enter your details to create an account.
SignUpPage.signInLink: Already have an account? Sign in
SignUpPage.errorName_too_long: Name must be 255 characters or less.
SignUpPage.errorEmail_invalid: Please enter a valid email address.
SignUpPage.errorPassword_too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters.
SignUpPage.errorPassword_too_weak: Password must include both letters and numbers.
SignUpPage.errorAccount_exists: An account with this email already exists. Sign in or reset your password.
SignUpPage.rateLimitError: Too many attempts. Please try again in 15 minutes.

ForgotPasswordPage.title: Forgot password
ForgotPasswordPage.description: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
ForgotPasswordPage.successMessage: If an account exists for that email, we've sent a reset link. Check your inbox.
ForgotPasswordPage.rateLimitError: Too many requests. Please try again in 15 minutes.

ResetPasswordPage.title: Reset password
ResetPasswordPage.invalidToken: This reset link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.
ResetPasswordPage.missingToken: Missing reset token. Please use the link from your email.
ResetPasswordPage.rateLimitError: Too many attempts. Please try again in 15 minutes.

errors.teamIdRequiredForTeamLead: Team ID is required for team-lead role

UserForm.duplicateAdminRole: This user already has an admin role
UserForm.duplicateOrganiserRole: This user already has an organiser role for this event
UserForm.duplicateTeamLeadRole: This user already has a team lead role for this event and team
UserForm.eventRequired: Event is required for organiser role
UserForm.eventAndTeamRequired: Event and team are required for team lead role
UserForm.cannotRemoveOwnAdminRole: You cannot remove your own admin role

NavBar.screenReaderDialogDescription: Navigation menu with links to different sections of the application

Metadata.description: A system to support the organisation of alternative arts events

ShiftDialog.title: Title of Shift
ShiftDialog.lengthDescription: Length of the shift in HOURS
ShiftDialog.requirementsDescription: Qualifications that volunteers must have to sign up for this shift. Optional.

QualificationDialog.name: Name
QualificationDialog.nameDescription: Please include the relevant event and year for the requirement, This way we can tell the difference between each year's Ranger Training's, etc.
QualificationDialog.teamDescription: The team associated with this qualification. Optional.
QualificationDialog.errorMessageDescription: The error someone will see when attempting to sign up for a shift without this requirement.
